shelf.mod.config.title: Shelf
shelf.mod.config.option.general.auto_res: Restocks items which is specified in restockable list.
shelf.mod.config.option.display.screen.f: The field of view, angular extent of the observable world.
shelf.mod.config.option.performance.grap: The render distance. If this value is set to high, it impacts performance massively.
Vertical synchronization (VSync) is an option in most systems in which the video card is prevented from doing anything visible to the display memory until after the monitor finishes its current refresh cycle.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.top_bar.d: The height of the screen's header area.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.bottom_ba: The height of the screen's footer area.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.tab_width: Width ratio of the left tab selection list panel.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.option_wi: Width ratio of the central options list panel.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.tab_scrol: Scrolling multiplier speed for the tab panel.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.option_sc: Scrolling multiplier speed for the option panel.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.tab_heigh: The vertical height of an individual tab entry.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.option_he: The vertical height of an individual option entry.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.indent.de: The horizontal pixel indentation per tree depth level for tabs.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.tab_start: Initial top spacing padding inside the tab panel.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.option_st: Initial top spacing padding inside the option panel.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.text_padd: Horizontal base padding applied to texts.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.reset_btn: The width allocation for the option reset button widget.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.scrollbar: The pixel thickness of the scrollbar tracks.
Minimum clickable height scale for the scrollbar thumb.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.option_te: Horizontal indentation for option name labels.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.option_he: Horizontal indentation for option group category names.
shelf.mod.config.option.layout.desc_text: Horizontal text padding inside the information description card.
Vertical top text padding inside the information description card.
Right-bound word wrap safety padding for description strings.
